prompt: A botanical collage of tropical plants with lush greenery and vibrant flowers, layered on a soft cream background, exuding a sense of exotic wilderness.
prompt_refined: Generate a botanical collage composed of richly layered tropical plants. Include abundant, lush green foliage and vividly colored, vibrant flowers throughout the composition. The entire scene should be set against a soft cream background, conveying an untamed and exotic wilderness aesthetic.
